# Neuroscience Evidence Summary

## Thesis

Brain-response features can sometimes forecast aggregate audience behavior better than self-report alone. TRIBE v2 allows simulated neural-response features for video/audio/text stimuli, making it plausible as an experimental signal layer.

## Important caution

TRIBE predicts an average-subject brain response. It does not know:

```text
your exact audience
your platform distribution
your creator history
trend context
initial cohort response
private recommender thresholds
```

## Where TRIBE might help

```text
first-window hook strength
response decay across the clip
cross-modal coherence
language/audio/visual load
social/self relevance proxy
attention volatility
```

## Where TRIBE probably will not help alone

```text
trend timing
creator trust
account health
algorithmic expansion
audience-specific preferences
platform-specific penalties
```

## Research stance

Use TRIBE as an experimental feature layer. Treat the lift test as decisive.
